command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute 
-- Step 1: Delete the duplicate trade (id=30001, the earlier one)
DELETE FROM paperTrades WHERE id = 30001;

-- Step 2: Fix availableCash by subtracting the duplicate P&L that was wrongly added
-- Current cash: 26564.56, duplicate P&L was 9832.82
-- Correct cash = 26564.56 - 9832.82 = 16731.74
UPDATE paperLedger SET availableCash = 16731.740194926266 WHERE userId = 1;
